title: Is this a crazy assumption
wikitext:
[]: Is this a crazy assumption? WARNING: SOME SPOILERS Post by offthechainjoe » Thu Sep 03, 2009 5:37 pm I hope I don't get flamed for this.... Is it crazy to assume that the Rebuild of Evangelion series takes place after the original series/EoE, by some crazy time/space continuum altering thing... Because the moon is covered with a streak of blood like in EoE and Kaworou speaks as if he knows Shinji... I think in one dub he said "This time I'll make you happy..." This might also be some way for Anno to make this series without completely disregarding the original as if it never happened. Anyone else think this may be a possibility??

[]: Post by Sammaeloo » Thu Sep 03, 2009 6:09 pm Next time look harder....which wouldn't be very hard....at all considering that it is right below your's right now. [url]http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=4369[/url]

[]: Post by Ramiel² » Thu Sep 03, 2009 6:25 pm *Does the Slowpoke*
